title: leuconotis eugeniifolia
intro: Leuconotis eugeniifolia, also known as the 'Wedding Candle Plant' or 'Candle Plant', is a flowering plant species native to the Western Ghats in India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Leuconotis eugeniifolia are attributed to its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, often in the form of decoctions or infusions, are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
